---
id: branch-list
title: "List the branches with existing builds of an app's repository"
description: "Lists only those branches of a specified Bitrise app that have existing builds."
sidebar_label: "List the branches with existing builds of an app's repository"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "get api-method"
info_path: en/bitrise-api/api-reference/bitrise-api
custom_edit_url: null
---

import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"List the branches with existing builds of an app's repository"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/apps/{app-slug}/branches"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Lists only those branches of a specified Bitrise app that have existing builds.

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
